title: stenoloma tenuifolium
intro: Stenoloma tenuifolium is a species of fern, specifically a type of spleenwort, that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stenoloma tenuifolium include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
